title: The Steel Behind Geared
summary:
Main
Typically speaking, steel has been one of the major provider of freight employment within the minor bulk cargoes category, To illustrate, looking at the tonmiles breakdown of geared shipments, from Handysizes to Ultramaxes, in the first eight months of this year, the top three categories are: Grain (excl Soybeans) (~10-20%), Fertilizers (~12-15%) and Steel (~11-14%). From 2015 to 2020, global seaborne steel shipments had been on a gentle downward trend. However, this trend decisively changed from 2021 onwards, hitting a fresh peak last year.
